ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is based */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province of the location */,
  "country_id" TEXT /* Reference to the country of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location for geocoding */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location for geocoding */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., customer, warehouse, transit hub) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the address has been verified */,
  "verification_source" TEXT /* Source of verification (e.g., Google Maps, USPS) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the address was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the address */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code of the country */,
  "phone_code" TEXT /* International phone dialing code */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the country was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics manager, warehouse operator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Location ID of the user's primary address */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each location
